name: Garmin Connect Pro
description: Want to be fit like @steipete? Well, now you can track every step of your journey—literally. This skill pulls your complete Garmin Connect data into OpenClaw: activities, sleep, heart rate, stress, body battery, training readiness, VO2 max, and those race predictions you keep ignoring. Works with Fenix, Forerunner, Index scales, and anything else Garmin throws at you. Includes natural language queries, ASCII charts, week-over-week comparisons, and FIT/GPX downloads.
author: drpeterkalmar

GARMIN_EMAIL.description: Garmin Connect email (alternative to credentials file)

GARMIN_PASSWORD.description: Garmin Connect password (alternative to credentials file)

files.description: Garmin Connect login credentials (email + password). Used if env vars not set.

security: Credentials can be provided via GARMIN_EMAIL/GARMIN_PASSWORD environment variables OR credentials file
If using credentials file: stored in plaintext at ~/.config/garmin-connect/credentials.json with 600 permissions
Third-party library 'garminconnect' handles all Garmin API communication - audit at https://github.com/cyberjunkie/garminconnect
No direct external transmission except via garminconnect library to Garmin servers
Cron jobs with stored credentials increase exposure - consider using environment variables or secure credential storage

commands.ask: Natural language query (e.g., 'how did I sleep?')
commands.activity: Specific activity details with HR zones
